strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across software, hardware, and infrastructure with consistent technical depth and full-stack fluency.
Proven AI-agent and cloud infrastructure contributions at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling, directly aligning with AI strategy responsibilities.
Entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective — an open-source, Kubernetes-deployable AI-enabled geospatial platform used by real-world NGOs — demonstrating product ownership and systems thinking.
concerns: No explicit mention of a Master’s or PhD in an AI-related field, though practical AI experience is demonstrated.
German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic,' which may limit direct customer engagement in Germany-based roles.
Resume uses inconsistent name (Aisha Okonkwo vs. 'szabobogdan' URLs and GitHub), raising minor administrative clarity concerns.
response.justification: Aisha brings exactly the 15+ years of deep engineering experience required, with direct, demonstrable work in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS CDK, Kubernetes), and AI-powered product development through GISCollective — a live, production-grade platform used by conservation organizations. Their entrepreneurial initiative, full-stack fluency across languages and systems, and consistent pattern of building tools that enable scalable, distributed AI workflows make them a compelling fit for a director-level IC role focused on AI strategy and cloud innovation.
